title: Ubiquiti Network Video Recorder Instant
category: Ubiquiti / Cameras, security / IP NVR Recorders / UniFi Video
description: Recording device for connecting 6 cameras in 4K resolution or 15 cameras in FullHD resolution. Records are recording on 3,5" hard drive, which is not included in the package . 6-port PoE (802.3af) switch is used for connection cameras Managed Cameras HD, 2K, 4K Storage Capacity 3.5" drive bay (not included) Mounting Wall or din rail (din rail mount included) Management Ethernet, Bluetooth Device Power cord Mounting pad Mounting accessories
specsSearch: Image Max. recording resolution 8MP Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (7) 10/100/1000Mbps HDMI interface Yes Power Power type Mains power (230V) PoE-Out standards 802.3af PoE Out ports 6 PoE budget [W] 40 Max. power consumption [W] 9 Physical characteristics Design Desktop Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 0 up to 40 Weight [g] 1040 Width [mm] 220 Height [mm] 47 Depth [mm] 220 Hardware Number of supported IP cameras 15 Number of supported HDD 1
